title: PRODUCTS
description: We manufacture metal packaging for the food industry, combining quality, reliability, and many years of experience.

brush-ferrules.title: Paint Brush Ferrules
brush-ferrules.description: Metal crimp ferrules / joints for securing brush bristles to wooden or plastic handles.

trench-candle-cans.title: Trench Candle Cans
trench-candle-cans.description: Durable metal containers specially manufactured for long-burning military trench candles.

monpensier-tins.title: Monpensier Tin Boxes
monpensier-tins.description: Small metal-plated containers with lids for hard drop candies dusted with powdered sugar.
monpensier-tins.alt: Vintage Style Tin Boxes for Monpensier Candies
